title: ACCOUNTING MANAGER (FINANCE DEPARTMENT)
description:
• Roles & Responsibilities :

  • Manage full set of accounts and oversee the entire range of manufacturing functions, preparing monthly audit schedules , management reporting and ensure timely month-end and year end financial closing.

  • Oversee all financial operations, AR, AP & GL processes including monitor cash flows and projections.

  • Oversee quarterly GST submission and timely tax filing to ensure compliance.

  • Perform accounting for inventory management, including valuation methods, and reconciliation processes, ensuring accurate tracking of raw materials, WIP and finished goods.

  • Experience in system implementation and recommend process improvements.

  • Experience in managing banking facilities , such as AR financing and performing trust receipt.

  • Manage external audit processes, ensure full compliance with regulatory requirements and internal control policies.

  • Lead and support the finance team junior staffs in executing day-to-day financial operations.

  • Work closely and support cross-functional team coordination and alignment on finance processes.

  • Review on employees' reimbursement claims

  • Key Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in accountancy / finance or ACCA .

  • Minimum 5 years' experience in maintaining full set of manufacturing accounting or strong knowledge of manufacturing processes

  • Strong communication skills ; bilingual in English & Mandarin ( need to liaise with chinese-speaking counterparts )

  • Proficient in MS office & ERP software ( MES, Yonyou, SAP or Oracle )

  • A self starter who is able to plan, organise and take initiative to meet job objectives and deadlines independently.

  • Familiar with Singapore accounting regulations and strong in accounting principles knowledge

  • Significant hands-on experience using ERP and implementation experience preferred.

  • Fast learner and consistently drive for process improvement.

  • Possess can-do attitude and able to work in a dynamic start-up environment.

postedCompany.description:
Grandbull Network Technology, part of the Dojane Capital Group, is a next-generation investment advisory firm focused on deep technology, artificial intelligence (AI), and emerging digital asset ecosystems.


We are committed to supporting our investment teams with accurate, efficient, and transparent administrative and operational processes, ensuring smooth execution of investment strategies across public and private markets.

Grandbull Network Technology 隶属于 Dojane Capital Group（道杰资本集团），是一家专注于深度科技、人工智能（AI）以及新兴数字资产生态系统的新一代投资顾问公司。

我们致力于为投资团队提供精准、高效且透明的行政与运营支持，以确保在公开市场与私募市场中的各类投资策略能够顺利执行、稳健落地。
postedCompany.name: GRANDBULL NETWORK TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
